title: Reliance Footprint Holdings Services is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Reliance Footprint Holdings Services is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Footprint Holdings Services! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Footprint Holdings Services:
Reliance Footprint Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
